query:
-- Fix media_outreach_status: rename 'status' column to 'mediaStatus' to match schema
ALTER TABLE `media_outreach_status` 
  CHANGE COLUMN `status` `mediaStatus` ENUM('not_sent','sent','responded','no_reply','meeting') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'not_sent';

-- Fix tips table: rename camelCase columns to match schema (burnerEmail, ipHash, fileUrl, fileKey, fileName, adminNotes, createdAt, updatedAt)
ALTER TABLE `tips`
  CHANGE COLUMN `burner_email` `burnerEmail` VARCHAR(320) NULL,
  CHANGE COLUMN `file_url` `fileUrl` VARCHAR(1000) NULL,
  CHANGE COLUMN `file_key` `fileKey` VARCHAR(500) NULL,
  CHANGE COLUMN `file_name` `fileName` VARCHAR(255) NULL,
  CHANGE COLUMN `ip_hash` `ipHash` VARCHAR(64) NULL,
  CHANGE COLUMN `admin_notes` `adminNotes` TEXT NULL,
  CHANGE COLUMN `created_at` `createdAt` TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  CHANGE COLUMN `updated_at` `updatedAt` TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP;
